name: Ham, Green Beans, and Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 slices bacon, just enough for flavor; coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a skillet until crispy.
2. Pour off excess grease, leaving enough to coat the bottom of the pan.
3. Add ham and cook until heated through.
4. Add potatoes, green beans, and water.
5. Cover and cook until potatoes and green beans are tender, approximately 15 minutes.
